projects.name: Hawkeye
projects.description: AI-Powered Video Anomaly Detection System. Built a video analysis project integrating the Gemini API to identify anomalies in uploaded footage. Implemented live video handling and API request processing using React and TypeScript. Parsed AI-generated responses to create timestamp-based anomaly reports.

projects.name: Snap to Scroll
projects.description: Sound-Based Smart Scrolling System. Developed a browser-based scrolling system controlled using finger snap sound detection. Processed real-time microphone audio input using Web Audio API. Implemented automatic page navigation with interactive UI feedback and animations.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science and Engineering
